persons.arguments_against: The 1910 stint is a single initial 'A.'. But the entry is Sir Edward Allan Grannum, Mauritius: auditor-general 1909 then receiver-general 1912 — the two stints hold exactly those two offices in sequence in Mauritius, with the C.M.G. (1915) on the receiver-general records. One continuous career.
persons.would_overturn: A second same-surname person serving the same colony in the same years and offices, or a printed birth/death date excluding these years.

notes: production high-value slice, hand-adjudicated (Claude Code, in-session)
